name: core_mem_diverges_with_sbuf
code:
proof fn phi_3_core_mem_diverges_with_sbuf(pre: State, core: Core, addr: usize, value: usize)
    requires
        pre.sbuf[core] =~= seq![(addr, value)],
        pre.pt_mem.mem.contains_key(addr),
        pre.pt_mem.read(addr) != value,
    ensures
        pre.core_mem(core).read(addr) == value,
        pre.core_mem(core).read(addr) != pre.pt_mem.read(addr),
{
}
reason: A single pending store buffer entry makes the core's view diverge from global memory — tests that TSO correctly models store buffer forwarding
